parameters.responseBody:
={
  "success": true,
  "action": "{{ $('Confirm PATCH Applied').first().json.action }}",
  "feature_key": "{{ $('Confirm PATCH Applied').first().json.feature_key }}",
  "feature_value": {{ $('Confirm PATCH Applied').first().json.feature_value }},
  "previous_value": {{ $('Confirm PATCH Applied').first().json.current_value }},
  "patch_confirmed": {{ $('Confirm PATCH Applied').first().json.patch_confirmed }},
  "no_change": {{ $('Confirm PATCH Applied').first().json.no_change }},
  "user_id": "{{ $('Confirm PATCH Applied').first().json.user_id }}",
  "reason": {{ JSON.stringify($('Confirm PATCH Applied').first().json.reason) }},
  "updated_at": "{{ $('Confirm PATCH Applied').first().json.now }}",
  "entitlements": {{ JSON.stringify($('Confirm PATCH Applied').first().json.updated_entitlements) }}
}
